content.query:
CREATE VIEW v_Supplier_MasterData
-- drop view v_Supplier_MasterData
as
SELECT          CI.SUNO AS              [Supplier ID]
,               CI.SUNM AS              [Supplier Name]
,               CI.STAT AS              [Status]
,               CA.ADR1 AS              [Address 1]
,               CA.ADR2 AS              [Address 2]
,               CA.TOWN as              [City]
,               CA.ECAR as              [State]
,               CA.CSCD as              [Country]
,               CS.TX15 as              [Payment Terms]
,               CS2.TX15 as             [Payment Method]
,               CS3.TX40 AS             [Category]
, CASE WHEN CI.CFI3 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN CI.CFI3 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN CI.CFI3 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services'
            WHEN CI.CFI3 in ('CMP', 'CNR') then 'Consumer'
            else 'Pending' end as       Division
,           CASE WHEN CI.CFI4 = 'CMP' then 'Compact'
            WHEN CI.CFI4 = 'CNT' then 'Countertop'
            WHEN CI.CFI4 = 'COM' then 'Commercial' 
            WHEN CI.CFI4 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN CI.CFI4 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services'
            else 'Pending' end as       [Business Unit]
,           CV.RESP AS                  [Responsible]
FROM            M3.CIDMAS CI
LEFT JOIN       M3.CIDVEN CV ON CI.SUNO = CV.SUNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.CIDADR CA on CI.SUNO = CA.SUNO AND CA.ADTE = '1' and CA.ADID = '1'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS ON CV.TEPY = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'TEPY'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON CV.PYME = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'PYME'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS3 ON CV.SUCL = CS3.STKY AND CS3.STCO = 'SUCL'
